list.name: Changes
list.comment:

# Conflicts: # .idea/Akira.iml # .idea/compiler.xml # .idea/workspace.xml # pom.xml # src/main/java/model/Cliente.java # src/main/java/model/Contrato.java # src/main/java/model/Empleado.java # src/main/java/model/Persona.java # src/main/java/module-info.java # src/main/java/service/ServiceCuenta.java # src/main/java/service/ServiceException.java # src/main/java/view/ControladorLogin.java # src/main/java/view/ControladorMenuInicio.java # src/main/java/view/ControladorMenuPrincipal.java # src/main/java/view/ControladorRegister.java # src/main/java/view/UtilidadesFX.java # src/main/resources/FXML/Login.fxml # src/main/resources/FXML/MenuInicio.fxml # src/main/resources/FXML/MenuPrincipal.fxml # src/main/resources/FXML/Register.fxml

task.summary: Default task
feat: Creación metodos controlador de sesion en SesionCuenta

feat: Asignacion de los botones al FXML
feat: Imports FXML agregados

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: feat: Creación menu principal empleado y su controlador
